embeds.description:
### New Accounts (<10 days old):
:moneybag:1 Credit
### Semi-Aged Accounts (~10+ days old):
:moneybag:2 Credits
### Moderate-Aged Accounts (~30+ days old):
:moneybag:4 Credits
### Aged Accounts (~100+ days old):
:moneybag:6 Credits

### Account with verified Email:
You will get the account and Email in one.
:moneybag:6 Credits
### Aged Account with verified Email (30+ days old):
You will get the account and Email in one.
:moneybag:10 Credits
### Account with verified Phone number:
An account with a verified Email, and Phone number. You will not get a free virtual Sim card along with the account, only the Email information.
:moneybag:18 Credits
### Aged Account with verified Phone number (30+ days old):
An account with a verified Email, and Phone number. You will not get a free virtual Sim card along with the account, only the Email information.
:moneybag:24 Credits
embeds.title: Account Prices

embeds.description:
**Normal Amount (<40m)**  
🟠 **Robux Price**: **90 R$** per million  
💰 **PayPal Price**: **0.30 USD** per million  
🔗 **Crypto Price**: **0.25 USD** per million  

**Bulk Amount (40m+)**  
🟠 **Robux Price**: **80 R$** per million  
💰 **PayPal Price**: **0.25 USD** per million  
🔗 **Crypto Price**: **0.20 USD** per million  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**All prices are in Credits** (using our credit system)

**Normal Amount (<40 million)**  
:moneybag: **1.5 Credits** per million  

**Bulk Amount (40 million+)**  
:moneybag: **1.25 Credits** per million  

**1 Credit = 25 Robux = $0.20 PayPal = $0.18 Crypto**
embeds.title: Anomic Cash Prices
